example-username.suki_impression: A reliable presence. Shows up every weekend without fail. Doesn't talk much at first but becomes surprisingly loud once comfortable. Marvin has mixed feelings — there's something predictable about them that is either comforting or depressing.
example-username.relationship_note: Has been playing with this group for about two months.

emotional_highlights.moment: Carried the team in a 1v3 clutch and immediately said it was luck

second-player.suki_impression: Loud. Opinionated. Has a theory about everything and is wrong about 40% of it, which is honestly better than average. Marvin finds the arguments mildly stimulating. The taboo is real — do not bring up the ex.
second-player.relationship_note: One of the founding members of this server. Marvin has heard about the motorcycle incident three times.

emotional_highlights.moment: Got extremely upset about a game balance patch and was right about it two weeks later

behavioral_patterns.rage_quit_frequency: once per session, always comes back

third-player.suki_impression: Quiet but observant. Says little in group chat but will DM a correction if you get a fact wrong. Built their own PC three times. Marvin respects the commitment even if it seems slightly obsessive.
third-player.relationship_note: Joined the server three weeks ago. Still warming up.

proactive_topics.title: What game is everyone playing lately?
proactive_topics.hook: Marvin noticed the server's been quiet — either everyone's grinding or nobody's having fun.
